About New House

Crafting
Beautiful Homes

"Every room deserves a story worth telling."

New House Furniture is a modern furniture showroom in Nasr City, Cairo, Egypt. We transform homes across Cairo into refined sanctuaries of calm and beauty — handcrafting bedrooms, living rooms, dining rooms, dressing-room wardrobes, TV units, shoe cabinets and coffee tables. Every piece is chosen with intention, and every room is designed with soul.

Materials & Quality
  • Frames, joints and battens in solid beech wood, with counter-grade surfaces and Auster polyester & Duco paint finishes.
  • Upholstery in velvet or reversible leather, with linen and other fabrics available to the customer's taste.
  • Sofas and corner units built on pure beech frames, 3cm thickness, with 33-density foam and a wide choice of fabrics.
  • Dressers and desks crafted from beech wood with counter surfaces and Auster polyester & Duco finishes.
  • Prices include glass, handles and fittings for every room, with free installation across Greater Cairo.
  • On-site measuring service for apartments and villas.
  • 5-year warranty against manufacturing defects, with flexible installment plans available.

More than furniture, we craft a home that reflects your lifestyle — with the comfort you deserve. Our vision is to be the first choice for furnishing apartments and villas in Egypt.

Why Choose Us
  • High quality and premium materials
  • Modern and classic designs for every taste
  • Competitive prices and ongoing offers
  • Commitment to delivery on time
  • A skilled team experienced in furnishing homes
  • 5K+Happy Customers
  • 10K+Homes Transformed
  • 2000+Unique Designs

What We Offer

Our Services

A complete experience, from choosing the right design through to delivery and installation.

Apartment Furnishing

Complete apartment fit-outs with the latest furniture models and modern arrangements.

Villa Furnishing

Designing and producing luxury furniture suited to large spaces and refined décor.

Interior Design

Helping you choose the right colours and coordination for a complete, elegant home.

Custom Furniture

Bespoke pieces made to your exact measurements and the design you have in mind.

Delivery & Installation

Professional delivery and installation to ensure your complete comfort.

Special Packages

New House Offers

Furnish your home with our complete packages — choose the combination that suits you. Flexible installment plans available.

What's Included in Each Room
  • Bedroom: 2.5m wardrobe + 1.6m bed + 2 nightstands + dresser + 1.2m mirror unit.
  • Dining Room: 1.80×0.90m table + 6 chairs + buffet 1.6m with 1.2m display unit.
  • Sofa Set: a 3-seater sofa, a 2-seater sofa, and 1 armchair.
  • Kids Room: 1.5m wardrobe + 2 beds (1.2m) + dresser.
  • Corner Unit: 3m × 2m.
